Package edu.yu.marketmaker.persistence.interfaces

package edu.yu.marketmaker.persistence.interfaces
Persistence interfaces for the Market Maker application.

This package defines the contracts for JPA-based persistence infrastructure, providing abstractions over Spring Data repositories and map store integrations used by the Hazelcast-backed distributed storage layer:

  • BaseJpaRepository - Base Spring Data JPA repository interface providing common CRUD and query operations for IdentifiableEntity subclasses.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    edu.yu.marketmaker.persistence
    JPA-based persistence infrastructure for the Market Maker application.

    Description

    JPA Repository interface for ExternalOrderEntity persistence.
    JpaFillRepository
    JPA Repository interface for FillEntity persistence.
    JpaPositionRepository
    JPA Repository interface for PositionEntity persistence.
    JpaQuoteRepository
    JPA Repository interface for QuoteEntity persistence.
    JpaReservationRepository
    JPA Repository interface for ReservationEntity persistence.
